ogTitle: Salter Springs vs Sampson Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Salter Springs and Sampson Flat.
heading: Salter Springs vs Sampson Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Salter Springs, South Australia and Sampson Flat, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Salter Springs has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Sampson Flat (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Salter Springs or Sampson Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Salter Springs has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Sampson Flat scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Salter Springs scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Sampson Flat scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Salter Springs or Sampson Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Salter Springs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
